REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-17-2007 - OFF CALENDAR. PRIOR TO TRIAL CALL, PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT THIS MATTER HAD SETTLED. JUDGE: MARY E. WISS; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, CSR #4280 (206)

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT JAMES COWEN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. JAMES COWEN HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)

THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Ernest Halperin, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Thomas McCormick is appearing on behalf of plaintiff Rosemary McCormick.
Arnold Walter Evjie specially appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant James Cowen is present.
Krista L. Mitzel representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

Per Judge Pro Tem Ernest Halperin, the parties may file stipulated judgment on Thursday, September 13, 2007. Plaintiff's counsel to notify UD Clerk if case settles. As of today, the trial date of September 17, 2007 remains on calendar.
